children.text: In this clip, Montejano discusses the traditions at her high school, as well as her involvement in the HemisFair '68 Protest.

citation: "High School Memories," from Diana Montejano Oral History Interview with Steve Arionus and Vinicio Sinta,  June 29, 2016, San Antonio, Civil Rights in Black and Brown Interview Database, https://crbb.tcu.edu/clips/4213/high-school-memories-2, accessed May 08, 2026
label: High School Memories
